title: Secret Manhunt!
description: Players are randomly selected as Secret Hunters (Impostors)! Inspired by zorato's "Secret Hunter" series
body:
# Secret Manhunt!
As an innocent player, your goal is simply to beat the Ender Dragon and return to the Overworld, all without dying. But watch out---a number of players are randomly selected to be **Secret Hunters**. To win, the Secret Hunters must kill all of the innocent players! Hunters will hide their identity and do whatever else is necessary to defeat the innocents.

### How to Use
* When starting, players will be placed into a small lobby.
* The first player to join is designated as the game's host. If this player disconnects, the player who joined next earliest will be selected.
* The host can start the game and customize the number of hunters using the following command:
```
/trigger SH_StartTrigger set 1
```
* 1 can be replaced with a larger number for more hunters.

### Details
* This pack can be played with 2+ players.
* Hunters can respawn, but players will become spectators on death.
* Players only win when *returning* to the overworld after killing the dragon.
* This datapack is best played with proximity chat or voice call.
* Advancement messages and Death messages are disabled.
* Currently, this pack should be played on a fresh world for each match.
* This pack changes certain values, and **should not be used on existing worlds**.
* This pack was inspired by [this series](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL9_2Lb8bjwj3BrWXW_iIPKCotqKghrHeA) from the zorato YouTube channel. Indirect inspiration has also been taken from Among Us by Innersloth and the original Minecraft Manhunt series.

Have fun, and good luck!
